mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.user_certificate ( user_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, file_type_nm, reg_id, mdfcn_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{userOid}, #{orgnlFileNm}, #{strgFileNm}, #{strgFilePath}, #{strgFileCpct}, #{fileTypeNm}, #{regId}, #{mdfcnId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ${schema}.file WHERE tbl_nm = 'user' AND tbl_oid = #{userOid} AND use_yn = 'Y' )

SELECT file_oid AS userCertificateNo, tbl_oid AS userOid, orgnl_file_nm AS orgnlFileNm, strg_file_nm AS strgFileNm, strg_file_path AS strgFilePath, strg_file_cpct AS strgFileCpct, file_type_nm AS fileTypeNm, reg_id AS regId, mdfcn_id AS mdfcnId FROM ${schema}.file WHERE tbl_nm = 'user' AND tbl_oid = #{userOid} AND file_type = 'ATTACHMENT' AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY atch_file_seq ASC, reg_dt DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts,
${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{aesKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn,
mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{aesKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx,
inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt
FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_oid = #{userOid} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.user SET pswd = #{newPswd}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = IFNULL(#{mdfcnDt}, NOW()) WHERE user_oid = #{userOid} AND user_id = #{mdfcnId}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('del', LPAD( COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(user_nm_eng, 4) AS UNSIGNED)) + 1 FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_nm_eng LIKE 'del%' AND user_nm_eng REGEXP '^del[0-9]+$' AND LENGTH(user_nm_eng) = 11), 1 ), 8, '0'))
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.user SET user_nm_korn = CONCAT('탈퇴회원_', #{userOid}), user_nm_eng = #{delToken}, brdt = #{delToken}, pswd = #{dummyPassword}, user_stts = 'EXPIRED', eml_lcal = #{delToken}, eml_dmn = #{delToken}, mpno_pfx = #{delToken}, mpno_mid = #{delToken}, mpno_sfx = #{delToken}, inst_oid = #{delToken}, inst_nm = #{delToken}, dept_cd = #{delToken}, dept_nm = #{delToken}, jbps_cd = #{delToken}, jbps_nm = #{delToken}, lgn_fail_cnt = 0, prvc_use_yn = 'N', cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn = 'N', tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn = 'N', prvc_pvsn_agre_yn = 'N', trms_agre_yn = 'N', eml_rcptn_agre_yn = 'N', use_yn = 'N', mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = IFNULL(#{mdfcnDt}, NOW()) WHERE user_oid = #{userOid}
